# opslevel_team_property_definitions (Data Source)

Data source for all Team Property Definitions



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `team_property_definitions` (Attributes List) List of Team Property Definition data sources (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--team_property_definitions))

<a id="nestedatt--team_property_definitions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `team_property_definitions`

Read-Only:

- `alias` (String) The human-friendly, unique identifier of the team property definition.
- `description` (String) The description of the team property definition.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `locked_status` (String) Restricts what sources are able to assign values to this property.
- `name` (String) The display name of the team property definition.
- `schema` (String) The schema of the team property definition.
